title: Sponge Ball
description: Throwing snow Ball absorbs  water in 10x10 area
body:
# 🧽 Sponge Ball: The Ultimate Ocean Drainer!

Are you dreading the endless grind of clearing out an Ocean Monument? Sick of placing thousands of sand blocks and constantly drying out wet sponges in furnaces? Take a deep breath, because aquatic excavation just got a massive upgrade. 

Enter the **Sponge Ball**—your new secret weapon for instantly clearing massive bodies of water!

## 🌊 How It Works
It is beautifully simple and incredibly satisfying: **Just throw a snowball!** Wherever the snowball lands, it instantly absorbs and removes water in a massive **10x10 area**. No sponges required, no messy cleanup. Just point, throw, and watch the ocean disappear.

![Ss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/020595f0169bee486380822ddee6ad225e01667e.png)


## 🛠️ Why You Absolutely Need This
* **Ocean Monument Dominance:** Drain a Guardian temple in minutes instead of weeks.
* **Instant Underwater Bases:** Clearing out space for your custom Atlantis or underwater glass dome has never been this fast.
* **Flood Rescue:** Accidentally flooded your redstone machine or base? One quick throw fixes the disaster instantly.
* **Zero Grind:** Save hours of your real-life time and skip the tedious vanilla water-clearing mechanics.

## ⚙️ Quick & Easy Setup
Because this is a pure Data Pack, installation is a breeze! Just drop it into your world's `datapacks` folder and you are ready to conquer the seas. It is fully compatible with a massive range of Minecraft versions (1.16.x all the way up to 1.21+).

---

### 💡 Pro-Tips for the Sponge Ball:
1.  **The Moses Effect:** Spam a few Sponge Balls in a line to part the sea and create an instant dry walking path across an ocean.
2.  **Lava Alternative?** *(Try it out and see what happens!)*
3.  **Creative Terraforming:** Combine this with the **Mining Ball** to completely reshape coastal landscapes in seconds!

---
